assertions.title: Notification form renders with all fields

steps.expected: Notification form displayed with Recipient dropdown, Subject input, Body textarea with char counter, Send button (disabled until filled)
steps.observed: Form rendered with all required fields: Recipient combobox with 8 user options, Subject textbox, Body textarea, '0 characters' counter, disabled Send Notification button

steps.action: Check Recipient dropdown populated from GET /admin/users
steps.observed: Combobox contains 8 user options populated from GET /api/v1/admin/users (verified via performance API: status 200)

steps.action: Check Body textarea with char counter
steps.observed: Body textarea present with placeholder 'Enter your message here...' and '0 characters' counter displayed below

steps.action: Check Send button disabled until filled

steps.observed: Filled 'Test Notification Subject' in Subject textbox
Filled 'Test notification body for validation' in Body textarea

steps.expected: POST /admin/notify returns 200, toast 'Notification sent', form resets
steps.observed: POST /api/v1/admin/notify returned 200 (verified via performance API, duration 39ms). Form reset to initial state: recipient back to 'Select a user...', subject/body empty, char counter '0 characters', Send button disabled.
Toast appeared and auto-dismissed before DOM inspection. Form reset confirms successful submission.

steps.expected: All fields cleared, Send button disabled
steps.observed: Recipient reset to 'Select a user...' (selected), Subject empty, Body empty, char counter '0 characters', Send button disabled

assertions.title: Send button disabled without required fields

steps.action: Verify Send button disabled with empty form
steps.expected: Button disabled when no recipient and no body
steps.observed: Send Notification button is [disabled] on initial empty form load

steps.action: Select recipient only, leave body empty
steps.observed: Selected 'Validation Admin' as recipient, Send Notification button remains [disabled]

steps.expected: Button becomes enabled when both recipient and body are filled
steps.observed: After filling body textarea, Send Notification button is enabled (no [disabled] attribute)

frictions.description: Native HTML select/combobox interaction via agent-browser click on option elements timed out. Had to use JavaScript eval to set select value programmatically.
frictions.resolution: Used document.querySelector('select').value with change event dispatch to select recipient

frictions.description: Toast notification auto-dismissed before DOM inspection could capture its text content. Could not directly verify 'Notification sent' text in toast.
frictions.resolution: Verified toast indirectly via successful POST response (200) and form reset behavior, which are the primary indicators of successful submission

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. Notification form renders correctly with all fields (recipient dropdown populated from API, subject input, body textarea with char counter, disabled send button). Send notification E2E works: POST /api/v1/admin/notify returns 200, form resets after send. Send button correctly disabled when required fields are empty, enables only when both recipient and body are filled.
